svg.text: Using rectangle perimeter for progressive drawing Script // we get dimensions for rectangle node = evt.target.ownerDocument.getElementById('rectangle') w = parseFloat(node.getAttributeNS(null , "width")) h = parseFloat(node.getAttributeNS(null , "height")) // Calcul of perimeter perimeter = 2 * ( w + h ) // Affect this value for stroke-dasharray and stroke-dashoffset node.setAttributeNS(null , 'stroke-dasharray' , perimeter.toString() + " " + perimeter.toString() ) node.setAttributeNS(null , 'stroke-dashoffset' , perimeter.toString() ) // Affect this value for from in animate element evt.target.ownerDocument.getElementById('anime1').setAttributeNS(null , 'from' , perimeter.toString() ) SVG objects <rect id="rectangle" x="200" y="340" width="300" height="200" stroke="blue" fill="lime" fill-opacity="0" > <animate id="anime1" attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" to="0" dur="5s" begin="go.click" fill="freeze"/> </rect>
